data.title: $1.6M Vanishes in a Week as Crypto Address Poisoning Scams Surge
data.description:
Between Aug. 9 and 15, 2025, crypto address poisoning scams stole over $1. 6 million from users, highlighting the growing risk of low-tech but highly effective attacks.

The post $1. 6M Vanishes in a Week as Crypto Address Poisoning Scams Surge first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/08/15/crypto-address-poisoning-drain-1-6m/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=crypto-address-poisoning-drain-1-6m

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Cap Falls Below $4.1 Trillion
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from CoinGecko indicates that the total cryptocurrency market capitalization has declined below $4.1 trillion, currently standing at $4.068 trillion. This marks a 1.3% decrease over the past 24 hours.
